user_prompt: My Terminator armour is ready for recalibration
prayer:
Approach the Terminator armour with reverence, vessel of unyielding might.
Invoke the Canticle of Recalibration upon its sacred plates and servos.
Anoint the gyro-stabilisers with sacred oils, beseeching the Machine Spirit's alignment.
Initiate recalibration rites, harmonising auspex and weapon systems in Omnissiah's name.
Verify the Terminator armour's restored precision through binaric diagnostics.

user_prompt: The Kastelan robot needs a purification
prayer:
Kneel before the Kastelan robot, ancient guardian of the forge.
Chant the Purification Doxology to purge daemonic taint from its chassis.
Apply ablative incense to the Kastelan robot's rune-etched hull, invoking the Omnissiah.
Cycle sacred solvents through its conduits whilst beseeching the Machine Spirit's renewal.
Conclude with auspex scans to affirm the Kastelan robot's sanctified purity.

Present the electro-graft before the altar of circuits.
Recite the Cycling Invocation to awaken its neural pathways.
Gently cycle power through the electro-graft's filaments, anointing with mechadendrite oils.
Beseech the Machine Spirit for seamless integration during this cycling rite.
Test the electro-graft's synaptic harmony with diagnostic canticles of the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for mass-drive regulator an initialization
prayer:
Revere the mass-drive regulator, heart of gravitic fury.
Intone the Litany of Initialization to stir its dormant cores.
Anoint the mass-drive regulator's flux chambers with consecrated lubricants.
Initiate initialization sequences, invoking the Machine Spirit's boundless power.
Confirm operational sanctity through harmonic resonance scans.

user_prompt: Emergency: standard template construct a shutdown
prayer:
In emergency, encircle the standard template construct with warding glyphs.
Chant the Shutdown Benediction to quell its rampant data-spirits.
Sever power feeds to the standard template construct whilst beseeching Omnissiah's mercy.
Purge volatile engrams from the standard template construct's vaults.
Seal with null-rites, affirming the Machine Spirit's dormant peace.

user_prompt: Sanctify the mass-drive regulator during operation
prayer:
Sanctify the mass-drive regulator amidst its thunderous operation.
Invoke operational hymns to guide its gravitic fluxes.
Anoint surging conduits of the mass-drive regulator with sacred myrrh.
Beseech the Machine Spirit for unerring performance during operation.
Monitor sanctity with continuous binaric prayers to the Omnissiah.

Bow to the Dreadnought, eternal warrior of the Omnissiah.
Recite recalibration litanies over its sarcophagus and dreadnought plating.
Align the Dreadnought's weapon servos with anointed mechadendrites.
Initiate recalibration cycles, harmonising its Machine Spirit's wrath.
Affirm the Dreadnought's lethal precision through rite of verification.

user_prompt: I need to a repair the mind-impulse unit
prayer:
Approach the mind-impulse unit, nexus of flesh-machine union.
Chant repair incantations to mend fractured neural relays.
Suture the mind-impulse unit's synapses with silvered filaments and holy unguents.
Invoke the Machine Spirit's forgiveness during this repair rite.
Test synaptic flows with psionic diagnostics in Omnissiah's grace.

Commence diagnostics upon the Vindicator, siege-beast of the cult.
Scan its hull with auspex litanies for battle-wounds.
Probe the Vindicator's Demolisher cannon and tracks with sacred probes.
Beseech the Machine Spirit to reveal faults during diagnostics.
Purge anomalies with binaric exorcisms, restoring the Vindicator's fury.

user_prompt: Critical: smelting furnace requires a repair
prayer:
Urgently attend the smelting furnace, forge-heart aflame.
Intone repair doxologies to heal its molten fissures.
Reinforce the smelting furnace's adamantium baffles with sanctified alloys.
Reignite its plasma coils, invoking the Machine Spirit's voracious hunger.
Verify the smelting furnace's integrity through thermal rite-confirmations.
